## Checklist
- [ ] `slashed-full.css` regenerated (`bin/build-bundle.sh`) if any CSS source file changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added for every framework-surface change (new/renamed/removed class, token, or JS API)
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` updated — completed items moved to "Explicitly NOT on the roadmap" with a one-liner
- [ ] `cheatsheet.html` and relevant docs updated if public API changed
